name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == 
  /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
  /\ turn = 1

Next == 
  \E p \in 1..N :
    \/ /\ state[p] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
       /\ turn' = turn
    \/ /\ state[p] = "trying"
       /\ turn = p
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
    \/ /\ state[p] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
    /\ UNCHANGED turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
  /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES coordinatorState, participantStates, messages

(* Coordinator states *)
CoordinatorInit == coordinatorState = "Init"
CoordinatorPrepare == coordinatorState = "Prepare"
CoordinatorCommit == coordinatorState = "Commit"
CoordinatorAbort == coordinatorState = "Abort"

(* Participant states *)
ParticipantInit == \A i \in 1..N: participantStates[i] = "Init"
ParticipantVoting == \A i \in 1..N: participantStates[i] = "Voting"
ParticipantCommitted == \A i \in 1..N: participantStates[i] = "Committed"
ParticipantAborted == \A i \in 1..N: participantStates[i] = "Aborted"

(* Message types *)
Prepare == "Prepare"
VoteYes == "VoteYes"
VoteNo == "VoteNo"
CommitMsg == "Commit"
AbortMsg == "Abort"

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
    /\ participantStates = [i \in 1..N |-> "Init"]
    /\ messages = {}

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
CoordinatorSendPrepare == 
    /\ coordinatorState = "Init"
    /\ coordinatorState' = "Prepare"
    /\ messages' = messages \cup {Prepare}
    /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

(* Coordinator collects votes *)
CoordinatorCollectVotes == 
    /\ coordinatorState = "Prepare"
    /\ \E votes \in {VoteYes, VoteNo}^N:
        /\ messages' = messages \cup votes
        /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit" \* Assume all voted yes for simplicity
    /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

(* Coordinator sends Commit to all participants *)
CoordinatorSendCommit == 
    /\ coordinatorState = "Commit"
    /\ coordinatorState' = "Commit"
    /\ messages' = messages \cup {CommitMsg}
    /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

(* Coordinator sends Abort to all participants *)
CoordinatorSendAbort == 
    /\ coordinatorState = "Abort"
    /\ coordinatorState' = "Abort"
    /\ messages' = messages \cup {AbortMsg}
    /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes Yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes == 
    /\ participantStates = [i \in 1..N |-> "Init"]
    /\ messages = {Prepare}
    /\ participantStates' = [i \in 1..N |-> "Voting"]
    /\ messages' = messages \cup {VoteYes}
    /\ coordinatorState' = coordinatorState

(* Participant receives Commit and commits *)
ParticipantCommit == 
    /\ participantStates = [i \in 1..N |-> "Voting"]
    /\ messages = {CommitMsg}
    /\ participantStates' = [i \in 1..N |-> "Committed"]
    /\ messages' = messages
    /\ coordinatorState' = coordinatorState

(* Participant receives Abort and aborts *)
ParticipantAbort == 
    /\ participantStates = [i \in 1..N |-> "Voting"]
    /\ messages = {AbortMsg}
    /\ participantStates' = [i \in 1..N |-> "Aborted"]
    /\ messages' = messages
    /\ coordinatorState' = coordinatorState

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ CoordinatorSendPrepare
    \/ CoordinatorCollectVotes
    \/ CoordinatorSendCommit
    \/ CoordinatorSendAbort
    \/ ParticipantVoteYes
    \/ ParticipantCommit
    \/ ParticipantAbort

(* Fairness: each action eventually occurs *)
Fairness == WF_vars(Next)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars /\ Fairness

(* Type correctness *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ coordinatorState \in {"Init", "Prepare", "Commit", "Abort"}
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: participantStates[i] \in {"Init", "Voting", "Committed", "Aborted"}
    /\ messages \subseteq {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES forks, philosophers


\* Philosopher states
States == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

\* State variables
vars == <<philosophers, forks>>

\* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking, all forks are free
Init == /\ philosophers \in [1..N -> States]
        /\ forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: philosophers[i] = "thinking"
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: forks[i] = FALSE

\* Helper: indices of adjacent forks for philosopher i
adjacentForks(i) == <<i, IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1>>

\* Helper: philosopher i can eat if both adjacent forks are free
canEat(i) == forks[adjacentForks(i)[1]] = FALSE /\ forks[adjacentForks(i)[2]] = FALSE

\* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry
Hungry(i) == /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
           /\ UNCHANGED forks

\* Action: philosopher i starts eating (picks up forks)
StartEating(i) == /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![adjacentForks(i)[1]] = TRUE,
                                         ![adjacentForks(i)[2]] = TRUE]
                /\ UNCHANGED <<philosophers, forks>>

\* Action: philosopher i stops eating (puts down forks)
StopEating(i) == /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
               /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![adjacentForks(i)[1]] = FALSE,
                                        ![adjacentForks(i)[2]] = FALSE]
               /\ UNCHANGED <<philosophers, forks>>

\* Next-state relation: any philosopher can become hungry, start eating if possible, or stop eating
Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          (Hungry(i) \/ StartEating(i) \/ StopEating(i))

\* Fairness: each philosopher eventually gets to eat
Fairness == WF_vars(Next)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars /\ Fairness

\* Type correctness invariant
TypeOK == /\ philosophers \in [1..N -> States]
          /\ forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: philosophers[i] \in States
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: forks[i] \in BOOLEAN

\* Invariant: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously
NoDeadlock == \A i \in 1..N: ~(philosophers[i] = "eating" /\ philosophers[IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1] = "eating")

\* Invariant: a philosopher can only eat if both adjacent forks are free
NoForkConflict == \A i \in 1..N: ~(philosophers[i] = "eating" /\ forks[adjacentForks(i)[1]] = FALSE /\ forks[adjacentForks(i)[2]] = FALSE)

\* Invariant: a philosopher can only start eating if both adjacent forks are free
NoForkConflictStart == \A i \in 1..N: ~(philosophers[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[adjacentForks(i)[1]] = FALSE /\ forks[adjacentForks(i)[2]] = FALSE)

\* Invariant: a philosopher can only stop eating if both adjacent forks are free
NoForkConflictStop == \A i \in 1..N: ~(philosophers[i] = "eating" /\ forks[adjacentForks(i)[1]] = FALSE /\ forks[adjacentForks(i)[2]] = FALSE)

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => flag[j] = FALSE
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num[j] = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == 
    /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  \* Queue initialized with zeros
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ head' = head
    /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 1]  \* Mark slot as occupied

ConsumerAction == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
    /\ tail' = tail
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]  \* Mark slot as free

Next == 
    \/ ProducerAction
    \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K
    /\ q \in [1..K -> {0,1}]

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in 1..N \cup {None}
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = "Follower"

RequestVote(term, candidateId) == 
  /\ state = "Follower"
  /\ term >= currentTerm
  /\ votedFor = None \/ votedFor = candidateId
  /\ currentTerm' = term
  /\ votedFor' = candidateId
  /\ state' = "Follower"

Vote(term, candidateId) == 
  /\ state = "Candidate"
  /\ term = currentTerm
  /\ votedFor = candidateId
  /\ state' = "Candidate"

BecomeLeader == 
  /\ state = "Candidate"
  /\ state' = "Leader"

Next == \/ RequestVote(currentTerm, votedFor)
        \/ Vote(currentTerm, votedFor)
        \/ BecomeLeader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

TypeOK == /\ readers \in Nat
          /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N
CHANNELS \in [1..N -> 1..N -> FiniteSet({0,1})] \subseteq [1..N -> 1..N -> FiniteSet({0,1})]
\* CHANNELS[i][j] is the set of messages in transit from process i to process j

VARIABLES state, channel, marker, recorded, snapshot

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [i \in 1..N, j \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ marker = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ recorded = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ snapshot = [i \in 1..N |-> [state' |-> 0, channel' |-> [j \in 1..N |-> {}]]]

Send(i, j, msg) == /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = channel[i][j] \cup {msg}]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker, recorded, snapshot>>

Receive(i, j) == /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = channel[i][j] \setminus {Head(channel[i][j])}]
                /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = state[i] + 1]
                /\ UNCHANGED <<marker, recorded, snapshot>>

RecordState(i) == /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                 /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![i] = [state' : state[i], channel' : channel[i]]]
                 /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel>>

SendMarker(i, j) == /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = channel[i][j] \cup {marker}]
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker, recorded, snapshot>>

Next == \E i, j \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N
              /\ channel[i][j] # {}
              /\ Receive(i, j)
          \/ /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N
              /\ channel[i][j] = {}
              /\ Send(i, j, 0)
          \/ /\ i \in 1..N
              /\ NOT recorded[i]
              /\ RecordState(i)
          \/ /\ i \in 1..N /\ j \in 1..N
              /\ recorded[i]
              /\ NOT marker[i]
              /\ SendMarker(i, j)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker, recorded, snapshot>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ channel \in [1..N -> 1..N -> FiniteSet(Nat)]
          /\ marker \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ snapshot \in [1..N -> [state' : Nat, channel' : [1..N -> FiniteSet(Nat)]]]

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store


vars == <<store>>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  \/ /\ op = "Put"
     /\ k \in Keys
     /\ v \in Values
     /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
  \/ /\ op = "Get"
     /\ k \in Keys
     /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ Keys \subseteq [1..100]
  /\ Values \subseteq [1..100]
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, chosen -> FALSE, value -> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, chosen -> FALSE, value -> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = FALSE

Prepare(p, b) == 
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [maxBallot -> b]]
  /\ proposers' = [j \in 1..M |-> IF j = p THEN proposers[j] \cup [maxBallot -> b] ELSE proposers[j]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(p, b) == 
  /\ LET promises == {i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].maxBallot = b} IN
      /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i \in promises THEN acceptors[i] \cup [chosen -> TRUE] ELSE acceptors[i]]
      /\ proposers' = [j \in 1..M |-> IF j = p THEN proposers[j] \cup [chosen -> TRUE] ELSE proposers[j]]
      /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, b, v) == 
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [maxBallot -> b, value -> v]]
  /\ proposers' = [j \in 1..M |-> IF j = p THEN proposers[j] \cup [maxBallot -> b] ELSE proposers[j]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accepted(p, b, v) == 
  /\ LET accepts == {i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].maxBallot = b} IN
      /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i \in accepts THEN acceptors[i] \cup [chosen -> TRUE] ELSE acceptors[i]]
      /\ proposers' = [j \in 1..M |-> IF j = p THEN proposers[j] \cup [chosen -> TRUE] ELSE proposers[j]]
      /\ chosen' = chosen

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = 0
        /\ proposers[p].chosen = FALSE
        /\ Prepare(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosen = FALSE
        /\ Promise(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosen = FALSE
        /\ proposers[p].value = v
        /\ Accept(p, b, v)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosen = FALSE
        /\ proposers[p].value = v
        /\ Accepted(p, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot : Nat, chosen : BOOLEAN, value : V]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot : Nat, chosen : BOOLEAN, value : V]]
  /\ chosen \in BOOLEAN

THEOREM Spec => []TypeOK
THEOREM Spec => [](\E v \in V : \E p \in 1..M : proposers[p].value = v)
THEOREM Spec => [](\E v \in V : \E p \in 1..M : proposers[p].value = v)

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHUNK_COUNT
VARIABLES chunkIndex, retransmitCount, sentChunks, state

        /\ chunkIndex = 1
        /\ retransmitCount = 0
        /\ sentChunks = {}

SendChunk == /\ state = "idle"
            /\ chunkIndex <= CHUNK_COUNT
            /\ state' = "sending"
            /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex
            /\ retransmitCount' = 0
            /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks

SendSuccess == /\ state = "sending"
               /\ state' = "waiting"
               /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {chunkIndex}
               /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex
               /\ retransmitCount' = 0

SendFailure == /\ state = "sending"
               /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
               /\ IF retransmitCount' >= MAX_RETRIES
                  THEN state' = "failed"

               /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex
               /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks

Done == /\ state = "waiting"
        /\ chunkIndex' = chunkIndex + 1
        /\ IF chunkIndex' > CHUNK_COUNT
           THEN state' = "done"

        /\ retransmitCount' = 0
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks

Next == \/ SendChunk
        \/ SendSuccess
        \/ SendFailure
        \/ Done

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ state \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting", "done", "failed"}
          /\ chunkIndex \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT
          /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
          /\ sentChunks \subseteq 1..CHUNK_COUNT

====
